race.comment: BURLINGTON ARCADE (3) grows a leg for hoop Wiggins who has two wins and a placing from just three steers and has been racing in a rich vein of form this campaign. Will be right there when the whips are cracking. NOTTINGTON PRINCE (2) returned in good order with a solid dead heat win around this circuit and rider Sandkuhl sticks in the stirrups. Again gets the benefit of her 2kg claim and can go right on with the job now. CAROHVIC (5) has two wins and two seconds from eight spins at this track and will be high on confidence following that last-start win. Top-three commodity. AUTUMN GALE (7) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
